seoTitle: Caulfield East vs Caulfield South — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Caulfield East and Caulfield South. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Caulfield East vs Caulfield South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Caulfield East and Caulfield South.
heading: Caulfield East vs Caulfield South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Caulfield East, Victoria and Caulfield South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Caulfield South has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Caulfield East (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Caulfield East or Caulfield South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Caulfield East has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Caulfield South scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Caulfield East scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Caulfield South scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Caulfield East or Caulfield South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Caulfield South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
